title: Discrafted
body:
# The main idea
Ever played Dishonored and thought: "what would it look like in multiplayer and in a sandbox setting?", Discrafted is your answer! \
It aims to add most of the content from the original game to minecraft.

# Currently availible features:
- Ability unlocking and leveling system
- Runes 
- 5 abilities from the original game:
- _Void Blink_
- _Windblast_
- _Devouring swarm_
- _Dark Vision_
- _Time Bend_
## Roadmap 
- All of the abilities from dishonored 1 and 2
- Iconic weapons and armor
- Structures and mobs
# Feedback
If you want to share some suggestions or provide criticism, feel free to join the official discord server
